name: Curry of Beef Kenya
recipeInstructions:
For liquid: use beef broth, water, and/or liquid from canned fruit.
For fruits: cut into bite-size pieces; choose apples, pears, canned pineapple chunks, raisins, or any fruit you prefer. In a large Dutch oven, saute onion and curry powder in oil over medium heat until onion is soft. Remove onions from the pan. Increase heat to medium-high and brown beef (in batches if necessary). Add onions, beef, salt, pepper, and liquid (s) to the crock pot. Cover and cook on LOW for 6-8 hours. About 1/2 hour before serving time, add fruit (s). If needed, thicken stew with a cornstarch mixture. Serve over hot rice with your choice of condiments.
